ValidationRule.description: Rule requires users to input a Document Link before the Deal can be progressed to LOI in Works status,.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c ,'LOI in works'), ISBLANK( pro_Long_Document_Link__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must enter a link into the Document Link field before the Deal can be progressed to the LOI In Works status.
